eng: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
tag: Ang aklat ng lahi ni Jesucristo, na anak ni David, na anak ni Abraham.

eng: 2 Abraham begat Isaac; and Isaac begat Jacob; and Jacob begat Judas and his brethren;.
tag: 2 Naging anak ni Abraham si Isaac; at naging anak ni Isaac si Jacob; at naging anak ni Jacob si Juda at ang kaniyang mga kapatid;
